You envision new ways of working & organizing.
We help you make them real.

Quorum1 is the world's first meta-consultancy woven from the leading minds in systems change.

Quorum1 is your gateway to the most inspiring org innovators in the world. From novel entity structures & shared treasuries to collective sense-making & regenerative social architectures…

Whether you want to hire, partner, white-label, or just learn — welcome to quorum1.

Get inspired.

Interested in ideas, frameworks & tools from the cutting edge of organizational innovation?

Explore our thought work

As an ecomimetic org we are pioneering new ways to organize work while making our business model available to the global commons.

With a core network of over 600 professionals globally and an approach rooted in two decades of research & experimentation, we are deeply connected to the past, present and future of business.

Quorum1 helps turn visionary organizational designs into operational reality by assembling & operating diverse teams of innovators & global thought leaders. We help build the future because we are the future — from our entity structure to our daily operations.

600+ professionals in the global network
20yr of research & experimentation
40+ member organizations worldwide
Thought work

Explore the future of organizational innovation.

Quorum1 is a global network woven from the leading minds in systems change. Browse through the thought work of our member individuals & orgs.

5,700 word whitepaper

The governance stack: designing accountable organizations from first principles.

A framework for layering decision rights, resource flows, and accountability structures across networks of semi-autonomous teams — from DAO-adjacent structures to multi-stakeholder cooperatives.

By Malia Fonoti, Commons Engine Published Jan 7, 2026
38 minute talk

Building regenerative commons in a post-extractive economy.

Recorded at the Network Futures Summit, this talk maps the transition from extractive business models to regenerative commons-based architectures, with case studies from three Quorum1 member engagements.

By Yaw Darko, Dark Matter Labs Published Dec 14, 2025
23 minute podcast

Sense-making at scale: how distributed networks stay coherent.

What holds a global coalition together when there's no central authority? This conversation explores the tools, rituals, and governance structures that help Quorum1 member networks maintain alignment across time zones and disciplines.

By Seo-yeon Park, Other Internet Published Nov 3, 2025
Browse all thought work
Hire us

The Quorum1 meta-consultancy.

Tap into a global network of designers, technologists & innovators. Quorum1 gives you frictionless access to the rarest & hardest to find talent with no gatekeeping, no lock-in & no restrictive contracts.

Hire contractors, assemble flex teams, staff fractional roles, outsource operations or augment your existing team.

What's a meta-consultancy? A globally distributed coalition of boutique agencies & independent professionals weaving together into a hyper-agile super group.

Chat with the sales bot

Service offerings.

We provide a wide range of services. From bookkeeping to MVP product development to AI engineering to org design and beyond.

Governance architecture.

Design decision-making structures, accountability frameworks, and shared-governance models for your organization or coalition.

Via Governance Design $15K–$50K

Regenerative finance design.

Model treasury structures, token economies, and revenue-sharing arrangements that align incentives with long-term collective benefit.

Via Regenerative Finance $8K–$25K

Commons law & legal structure.

Navigate novel entity structures, multi-stakeholder agreements, and commons-based legal architectures with practitioners who've built them.

Via Commons Law $5K–$15K

Example projects.

Client work

Redesigning a $40M cooperative's governance structure.

A regional food cooperative with 12 member orgs needed a governance model that balanced central coordination with local autonomy. We assembled a three-practitioner team, ran a 6-week discovery sprint, and co-designed a new governance stack with member ratification built in.

Governance Architecture Facilitation Legal Structure
Client work

Treasury design for a multi-city climate coalition.

Seven organizations across four countries needed a shared treasury model that could hold grant funding, distribute to members, and remain auditable by funders. We delivered a full treasury architecture with supporting tooling in 8 weeks.

Regenerative Finance Treasury Ops Tooling

Joining the network

There is a place for you here.

Whether you're a solo practitioner, a boutique firm, or an organization working at the frontier of systems change — quorum1 was built for you. Choose your path in.

Join as an individual.

Independent practitioners join free. Gain access to the shared knowledge commons, member dispatches, collaborative projects, and the quorum1 brand network.

Become a member

Join as an org.

Member organizations join for a small onboarding contribution ($400–$600). Unlock co-marketing, shared brand halo, joint proposals, and lead pipeline access.

Weave into the network

Create a node.

Organize a guild of service providers around a practice area or region. Earn 10% of every project routed through your node to fund your own sales, marketing & research.

Learn how nodes work
How we organize

Nodes do the work the brand can't.

Twenty percent of every Quorum1 project flows back to nodes — ten to a region node, ten to a practice node — funding the sales, marketing, and research that keep the collective self-sustaining.

Communities of expertise.

Practice nodes

Practice nodes are member-led collectives organized around a domain — governance design, regenerative finance, commons law, decentralized infrastructure, sense-making. Each node curates its own thought work, runs joint research, and receives 10% of every project routed through its practice.

Governance Design Regenerative Finance Commons Law Decentralized Infra Sense-making Treasury Ops Network Stewardship
Geography is still real.

Region nodes

Region nodes route work to practitioners on the ground — local language, local law, local trust. They host gatherings, brief inbound clients, and recycle 10% of project revenue into community sales & marketing.

North America Latin America European Union United Kingdom Sub-Saharan Africa South Asia Pacific
About quorum1

We are the future we are helping to build.

Quorum1 is the world's first meta-consultancy for systems change. We are an ecomimetic organization — our governance model, treasury structure, and operations are all designed using the same regenerative, commons-based principles we help our clients adopt.

Founded in 2021, quorum1 operates as a self-governing collective. There is no single parent company. The brand is collectively stewarded by member organizations through a transparent governance stack. Revenue flows back to members and nodes, not to shareholders.

We believe the models for a post-extractive future already exist — scattered across nodes, organizations, and individuals who haven't yet found each other. Quorum1 is the front door.

Our full story
Founded 2021
Structure Meta-collective
Members 600+
Nodes 14 active
Reach 30+ countries
Revenue model 20% to nodes

The connective tissue of systems change.
